---
title: "Regression"
author: "Sam Yu"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(dplyr)
library(broom)
library(parameters)
library(viridis)

dat_clean <- readRDS("../data/dat_clean.rds")


```


```{r}
# define DV
intention_items <- dat_clean %>%
  select(paste0("action_intentions_", 1:15))

alpha(intention_items)
omega(intention_items)

```

```{r}
# DV inspection
# visualisation prepare
intention_long <- dat_clean %>%
  select(paste0("action_intentions_", 1:15)) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = everything(),
    names_to = "item",
    values_to = "score"
  )
```

```{r}
# histogram
ggplot(intention_long, aes(x = score)) +
  geom_bar() +
  facet_wrap(~ item, ncol = 4) +
  labs(
    title = "Distribution of Intention Items",
    x = "Response",
    y = "Count"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

# boxplot
ggplot(intention_long, aes(x = item, y = score)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  labs(
    title = "Boxplot of Intention Items",
    x = "Item",
    y = "Score"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r}
# zero order correlation 
# Define item sets
hope_items_4 <- c("hope_1", "hope_2", "hope_3", "hope_4")
action_items <- paste0("action_intentions_", 1:15)

# Create composites
# Hope composite: mean of four retained hope items from the revised CFA
# Intention composite: mean of 15 collective action intention items
dat_clean <- dat_clean %>%
  mutate(
    hope_composite_4 = rowMeans(
      select(., all_of(hope_items_4)),
      na.rm = TRUE
    ),
    
    intention_composite = rowMeans(
      select(., all_of(action_items)),
      na.rm = TRUE
    )
  )

# zero order correlation between hope composite and intention composite
cor_composites <- cor.test(
  dat_clean$hope_composite_4,
  dat_clean$intention_composite,
  method = "pearson"
)

cor_composites
```

```{r}
# Descriptive statistics for confirmatory H2 variables
h2_desc_table <- dat_clean %>%
  select(hope_composite_4, intention_composite) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = everything(),
    names_to = "variable",
    values_to = "score"
  ) %>%
  group_by(variable) %>%
  summarise(
    N = sum(!is.na(score)),
    M = mean(score, na.rm = TRUE),
    SD = sd(score, na.rm = TRUE),
    Min = min(score, na.rm = TRUE),
    Max = max(score, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    across(where(is.numeric), ~ round(., 3))
  )

h2_desc_table

# Correlation table for reporting
h2_cor_table <- tibble(
  Variable = c("1. Hope composite", "2. Action intention composite"),
  M = c(
    mean(dat_clean$hope_composite_4, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean(dat_clean$intention_composite, na.rm = TRUE)
  ),
  SD = c(
    sd(dat_clean$hope_composite_4, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd(dat_clean$intention_composite, na.rm = TRUE)
  ),
  `1` = c("—", round(unname(cor_composites$estimate), 3)),
  `2` = c("", "—")
) %>%
  mutate(
    M = round(M, 3),
    SD = round(SD, 3)
  )

h2_cor_table

# zero order correlations between hope items and intention items
cor_hope_action_items <- cor(
  dat_clean %>% select(all_of(hope_items_4)),
  dat_clean %>% select(all_of(action_items)),
  use = "pairwise.complete.obs"
)

cor_hope_action_items

# long format for visualisation
cor_hope_action_long <- as.data.frame(cor_hope_action_items) %>%
  rownames_to_column("hope_item") %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = -hope_item,
    names_to = "action_item",
    values_to = "correlation"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    correlation = round(correlation, 3),
    action_item_short = gsub("action_intentions_", "AI", action_item),
    hope_item_short = gsub("hope_", "H", hope_item)
  )

cor_hope_action_long

```

```{r}
# visualisation
# hope composite and intentions composite
ggplot(cor_composite_data, aes(x = hope_composite_4, y = intention_composite)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE) +
  labs(
    x = "General hope composite",
    y = "Collective action intention composite"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    axis.line.x = element_line(colour = "black"),
    axis.line.y = element_line(colour = "black")
  )


ggsave(
  filename = "../outputs/figures/hope_intention_scatter.png",
  width = 6,
  height = 4,
  dpi = 300
)

# reorder variables for plotting
cor_hope_action_long <- cor_hope_action_long %>%
  mutate(
    action_item_short = factor(
      action_item_short,
      levels = paste0("AI", 1:15)
    ),
    hope_item_short = factor(
      hope_item_short,
      levels = paste0("H", 4:1)   # keeps H4 at top and H1 at bottom
      # if you want H1 at top instead, use paste0("H", 1:4)
    )
  )


# Function to extract correlation and p value
get_cor_p <- function(x, y) {
  test <- cor.test(x, y, method = "pearson")
  tibble(
    correlation = unname(test$estimate),
    p = test$p.value
  )
}

# Item-level correlations with p values
cor_hope_action_long <- expand_grid(
  hope_item = hope_items_4,
  action_item = action_items
) %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(
    result = list(
      get_cor_p(
        dat_clean[[hope_item]],
        dat_clean[[action_item]]
      )
    )
  ) %>%
  unnest(result) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(
    p_adj = p.adjust(p, method = "BH"),   # Benjamini-Hochberg correction
    sig = case_when(
      p_adj < .001 ~ "***",
      p_adj < .01  ~ "**",
      p_adj < .05  ~ "*",
      TRUE ~ ""
    ),
    label = paste0(sprintf("%.2f", correlation), sig),
    action_item_short = factor(
      gsub("action_intentions_", "AI", action_item),
      levels = paste0("AI", 1:15)
    ),
    hope_item_short = factor(
      gsub("hope_", "H", hope_item),
      levels = paste0("H", 4:1)
    )
  )

# heatmap
ggplot(
  cor_hope_action_long,
  aes(x = action_item_short, y = hope_item_short, fill = correlation)
) +
  geom_tile(color = "white", linewidth = 0.4) +
  geom_text(aes(label = label), size = 3.2) +
  scale_fill_gradient(
    low = "#F7FBFF",
    high = "#2171B5",
    name = "r"
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "Action intention items",
    y = "Hope items"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold")
  )

ggsave(
  filename = "../outputs/figures/hope_action_item_heatmap.png",
  width = 8,
  height = 4,
  dpi = 300
)


```


```{r}
# # item level regression
# # each item
# model_h1 <- lm(intention_composite ~ hope_1, data = dat_clean)
# model_h2 <- lm(intention_composite ~ hope_2, data = dat_clean)
# model_h3 <- lm(intention_composite ~ hope_3, data = dat_clean)
# model_h4 <- lm(intention_composite ~ hope_4, data = dat_clean)
# model_h5 <- lm(intention_composite ~ hope_5, data = dat_clean)
# model_h6 <- lm(intention_composite ~ hope_6, data = dat_clean)
# model_h7 <- lm(intention_composite ~ hope_7, data = dat_clean)
# 
# summary(model_h1)
# summary(model_h2)
# summary(model_h3)
# summary(model_h4)
# summary(model_h5)
# summary(model_h6)
# summary(model_h7)
# 
# 
# # overall
# model_all <- lm(intention_composite ~ hope_1 + hope_2 + hope_3 + hope_4 + hope_5 + hope_6 + hope_7,
#                 data = dat_clean)
# 
# summary(model_all)
```

# regression based on CFA (Hope composite)
```{r}
# H2 confirmatory regression
h2_model <- lm(
  intention_composite ~ hope_composite_4,
  data = dat_clean
)

summary(h2_model)


```


# regressiion based on EFA (Hope 3 factors)
```{r}
# Preparing: regression based on EFA
# Generating factor scores into the original dataframe
hope_factor_scores <- as.data.frame(efa3$scores)

dat_clean <- dat_clean %>%
  bind_cols(hope_factor_scores)


# renaming hope factors 
dat_clean <- dat_clean %>%
  rename(
    Passive_Hope = ML1,
    Outcome_Hope = ML3,
    Action_Hope = ML2
  )
```

```{r}
# EFA based regression
model_hope3 <- lm(
  intention_composite ~ Action_Hope + Outcome_Hope + Passive_Hope,
  data = dat_clean
)

summary(model_hope3)

```
